title: peltophorum roxburghii
intro: Peltophorum roxburghii, also known as the Yellow Flame Tree or Yellow Shower, is a tropical tree native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Peltophorum roxburghii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Peltophorum roxburghii include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its flowers, leaves, and bark, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
